title: Peek-a-Boo Colors with Tomas
synopsis: Baby Tomas discovers colorful objects hidden around his home in this interactive peek-a-boo adventure. Each page reveals a new bright color as Tomas plays his favorite hiding game with familiar household items.

illustration.description: Chubby-cheeked toddler Tomas with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits on a soft cream carpet, covering his eyes with his small hands and giggling. He wears a bright yellow onesie. The living room background shows soft pastel furniture and natural sunlight streaming through windows.

pages.text: Where is the red ball? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: A bright red bouncy ball partially hidden behind a white cushion on a beige sofa. Tomas's curious dark eyes peek around the cushion edge, his eyebrows raised with excitement. Soft watercolor textures make the red ball glow warmly against the neutral background.
illustration.alt: Red ball hidden behind cushion with Tomas peeking

illustration.description: Tomas claps his hands with pure joy as the bright red ball bounces in front of him. His mouth forms a perfect 'o' of surprise and delight. Motion lines show the ball's bouncing path, and warm yellow light bathes the scene.
illustration.alt: Tomas clapping as red ball bounces

pages.text: Where is the blue cup? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: A sky-blue sippy cup hides behind a potted plant with green leaves. Only the cup's blue handle is visible. Tomas crawls on hands and knees, his head tilted curiously as he searches. The plant sits on a low wooden table with rounded edges.
illustration.alt: Blue cup hiding behind plant with searching Tomas

illustration.description: Tomas holds the bright blue sippy cup with both hands, tilting it toward his mouth. His cheeks are slightly puffed as he drinks. Tiny water droplets sparkle around the cup's rim, and his satisfied expression shows contentment.
illustration.alt: Tomas drinking from blue sippy cup

pages.text: Where is the yellow duck? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: A cheerful rubber duck in sunny yellow peeks out from behind a white bathroom towel hanging on a low hook. Steam wisps suggest recent bath time. Tomas reaches up on his tiptoes, stretching toward the towel with determination.
illustration.alt: Yellow duck behind towel with Tomas reaching

illustration.description: Tomas squeezes the bright yellow rubber duck, his face lighting up with giggles as small motion lines indicate the duck's squeaking sound. His other hand splashes in a shallow puddle of bathwater on the tile floor, creating tiny droplet splashes.

pages.text: Where is the green block? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: A forest-green wooden block hides under a soft pink blanket on the carpet. Just one corner of the block shows beneath the blanket's edge. Tomas sits cross-legged, lifting the blanket with one finger while his expression shows anticipation.
illustration.alt: Green block under blanket with curious Tomas

pages.text: There it is! Stack, stack! Tomas loves colors!

illustration.description: Tomas sits surrounded by all his colorful treasures: the red ball, blue cup, yellow duck, and green block arranged in a happy circle around him. He beams with the biggest smile, arms outstretched as if presenting his collection. Soft rainbow light filters through the scene.
illustration.alt: Happy Tomas surrounded by all his colorful objects

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Tomas's ball?
questions.explanation: Tomas finds a bright red ball that bounces!

questions.question: What sound does the duck make?
questions.explanation: The yellow duck makes a squeak, squeak sound when Tomas squeezes it!

questions.question: Where does Tomas find the blue cup?
questions.explanation: The blue sippy cup hides behind a green plant!
